mapper.insert: INSERT INTO location_workspace (space_no, space_name, type, build_id, uploader, created_at) VALUES (#{spaceNo}, #{spaceName}, #{type}, #{buildId}, #{uploader}, NOW())
mapper.update:
update location_workspace SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE location_workspace SET space_no = #{spaceNo}, space_name = #{spaceName}, type = #{type}, build_id = #{buildId}, uploader = #{uploader}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
